Terrain Recipe Console

Bind Assets To Biomes And Geography

Create recipe records that tell the world generator which terrain, structure, effect, slice, and audio assets fit each biome or geography context.

Asset Library Sheet Slicer Audio Intake Terrain Recipes
Recipe Records
Existing terrain recipe bindings stored in the database.
Recipe Examples
Recipes bind assets to map contexts. Set biome or terrain, then attach visuals, slices, and audio.
  • Forest plains zone: weight `120`, world-geography grass/tree assets
  • Hazard ridge flow: min danger `5`, cliff/ridge effects
  • Use palette colors when the generator should tint geography directly
Recipe Editor

New Terrain Recipe

Pick the biome or flow context, then attach fitting asset and slice references.

Visual Assets
